homepage.title: Trophy Wife Supply | Custom Hats, Boutique Apparel, and Accessories
homepage.description: Discover Trophy Wife Supply for premium custom hats, feminine statement pieces, boutique apparel, and accessories designed to convert first-time visitors into loyal shoppers.
homepage.primaryH1: Luxury-flirty boutique style with statement hats and elevated accessories

collection.descriptionTemplate: Shop {collectionName} at Trophy Wife Supply for premium boutique style, strong merchandising, and feminine statement pieces designed for gifting and repeat wear.
bodyCopyRules: Lead with primary keyword in the first sentence
Link to adjacent collections and best sellers

product.descriptionTemplate: Shop the {productName} from Trophy Wife Supply. Premium boutique quality, gift-ready styling, and luxury-flirty details built for standout outfits.
bodyCopyRules: Open with a value-led product summary
Describe styling use cases before specs
Include fit, material, and gifting cues
Support related product links below the fold

editorial.descriptionTemplate: Read Trophy Wife Supply's guide to {topic} with boutique outfit ideas, gifting direction, and internal links to shop the matching collection.
bodyCopyRules: Answer the search intent in the introduction
Add commerce links above the fold
Target one primary keyword and two supporting variants

about.title: About Trophy Wife Supply | Boutique Brand Story
about.description: Learn more about Trophy Wife Supply, a premium boutique brand built around statement hats, feminine style, and scalable ecommerce merchandising.

contact.title: Contact Trophy Wife Supply | Customer Support
contact.description: Contact Trophy Wife Supply for order help, product questions, wholesale inquiries, and boutique customer support.

faq.title: FAQ | Trophy Wife Supply
faq.description: Find answers about shipping, returns, sizing, order timing, and boutique product details at Trophy Wife Supply.
